title: make gives `gometalinter.v1: error: failed to install the following linters:`
body:
**Description**
When doing `make` for the Buildah code from GitHub, this error is received: 
```
gometalinter.v1: error: failed to install the following linters:
```

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. 'make`


**Describe the results you received:**
See description.

**Describe the results you expected:**
Clean make.

comments.body: This has been cleaned up, closing.
